roads.name: Roads & Maintenance
roads.description: Handles potholes, road damage, asphalt repairs, and public pathways.

electrical.name: Electrical Services
electrical.description: Responsible for streetlighting, exposed wiring, traffic signals, and electrical hazards.

water.name: Water Services
water.description: Manages burst pipes, water mains, drainage blockages, and clean water leakage.

sanitation.name: Sanitation Department
sanitation.description: Maintains city cleanliness, garbage collection, illegal dumping removal, and waste bins.

general.name: General Administration
general.description: General municipal issues, policy queries, or complex issues spanning multiple departments.
